name: @mparticle/web-google-analytics-4-kit
description: mParticle integration sdk for Google Analytics 4

scripts.build: npm ci --prefix packages/GA4Client && npm run build --prefix packages/GA4Client && npm ci --prefix packages/GA4Server && npm run build --prefix packages/GA4Server
scripts.test: npm test --prefix packages/GA4Client && npm test --prefix packages/GA4Server

author: mParticle Developers <developers@mparticle.com> (https://www.mparticle.com)
